query:
SELECT 
  s.id, s.sceneIndex, s.mvSceneStatus, s.taskId, s.errorMessage, s.updatedAt,
  j.status as jobStatus
FROM musicVideoScenes s
JOIN musicVideoJobs j ON j.id = s.jobId
WHERE s.jobId = 540001
ORDER BY s.sceneIndex;
command:
